description: Brex provides business financial software including corporate cards, expense management, bill pay, banking, travel, and accounting workflows. Its platform is used by companies to control and automate spending and related finance operations.
summary: Brex exposes a REST API at https://api.brex.com plus an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://api.brex.com/mcp; both can also use Brex-issued bearer tokens in some cases, and partner integrations use Brex-issued OAuth client credentials.
